nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Multi-stage Docker build for the PharmAgent FastAPI backend: a builder stage installs pinned deps into a venv, and a slim runtime stage copies the venv plus app code, runs as a non-root user, and serves uvicorn on port 8000 with a /api/health healthcheck.
nodes.languageNotes: Multi-stage build isolates pip/build deps from the runtime image; drops privileges to a fixed-uid non-root user and mounts a writable /data volume for the SQLite DB.

nodes.name: builder
nodes.summary: First build stage (python:3.13-slim) that creates a virtualenv at /opt/venv and installs pinned requirements, keeping build tooling out of the final image.

nodes.name: runtime
nodes.summary: Final runtime stage (python:3.13-slim) that copies the prebuilt venv and app/sample_data, sets data-dir env vars, runs as non-root user 'pharma', exposes port 8000, and launches uvicorn for app.main:app.

nodes.name: .dockerignore
nodes.summary: Docker build-context exclusion list that keeps virtualenvs, caches, tests, local data, SQLite DBs, secrets, and git metadata out of the image build context.
